docs.description: Project documentation including architecture, extension docs, and maintenance guides

scripts.description: Build, audit, native-curl, and release helper scripts

build.description: Primary agent for implementation, code editing, and file operations

plan.description: Planning and analysis agent for architecture review and task decomposition

security-auditor.description: Reviews code for security vulnerabilities, injection risks, and capability gating violations

docs-writer.description: Writes and maintains project documentation, architecture guides, and changelogs

test-runner.description: Runs tests, analyzes coverage, and identifies untested code paths

release-manager.description: Manages release workflows, version bumps, and changelog generation

review.description: Perform a comprehensive code review of the specified files or recent changes
review.template:
Perform a thorough code review of the following code. Focus on:
1. Security vulnerabilities and injection risks
2. Capability gating violations (UI controls must match engine capabilities)
3. TypeScript type safety and error handling
4. Performance implications
5. Code style consistency with the existing codebase

Analyze: $ARGUMENTS

security.description: Run a security audit on the specified code or project area
security.template:
Conduct a security audit of the specified code. Check for:
1. Command/argument injection vulnerabilities
2. Path traversal or arbitrary file write risks
3. Loopback bridge authentication issues
4. Capability gating bypass attempts
5. Sensitive data exposure

Audit target: $ARGUMENTS

arch.description: Analyze architecture and provide improvement recommendations
arch.template:
Analyze the architecture of the specified component or feature. Consider:
1. Alignment with project structure (docs/architecture/PROJECT_STRUCTURE.md)
2. Centralization policy compliance
3. Separation of concerns
4. Dependency management
5. Scalability and maintainability

Analyze: $ARGUMENTS

test.description: Generate tests for the specified component or function
test.template:
Generate comprehensive tests for the specified code. Include:
1. Unit tests for core functionality
2. Edge cases and error scenarios
3. Integration points with engine capabilities
4. Mocking of external dependencies (Tauri API, daemon)

Target: $ARGUMENTS

release.description: Prepare a release (version bump, changelog, validation)
release.template:
Prepare a release for version $ARGUMENTS. Steps:
1. Validate version format (X.Y.Z or X.Y.Z-prerelease)
2. Update package.json and tauri.conf.json
3. Generate changelog from recent commits
4. Run final audit checks
5. Prepare release artifacts

i18n.template:
Validate and synchronize internationalization files. Run:
1. pnpm run i18n:sync
2. pnpm run i18n:validate
3. Check for missing translation keys
4. Verify translation completeness

Target: $ARGUMENTS

extension.description: Work on the browser extension component
extension.template:
Perform browser extension operations. Check:
1. Typecheck: pnpm --filter nova-browser-extension typecheck
2. Verify offline capabilities: pnpm --filter nova-browser-extension verify:offline
3. Build package: pnpm run extension:package
4. Verify Nova sync: pnpm --filter nova-browser-extension verify:nova-sync

Task: $ARGUMENTS

cleanup.description: Identify and remove unused code, dependencies, and files
cleanup.template:
Analyze the codebase for unused code, dependencies, and files. Check:
1. Unused imports and variables
2. Dead code paths
3. Deprecated dependencies
4. Files not referenced anywhere
5. Generate cleanup recommendations

Scope: $ARGUMENTS
